posts.author: corentin.dalfarra (AB testing)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,

I have a question about Monday date column. I have enabled the “show day of the week” option.

It seems that until today, the day of the week was translated into my current language (French).

Now this day came back to the english translation value. Do you know if it is a regression or if it is something usual ?

image362×1180 33.6 KB

I was used to use the french translated days so It would by annoying for me to come back to English.

Thank you for your help, have a nice day,

Corentin

posts.author: RavitL (Ravit Levy )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @corentin.dalfarra ,

Sorry to hear that. It seems like some kind of a buggy behaviour.
Please contact the monday.com Support team and they will be happy to help you solve it.

posts.author: corentin.dalfarra (AB testing)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @RavitL

Thank you for your reply, I have sent an email to Monday support team and they help me to fix that bug.

Have a nice day,

Corentin
